title: Peace City
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{City |image=[[File:Colony_One.png]] |name=Colony One |constructed=[[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' |destroyed= |rebuilt= |builder= |mayor= |celestialbody=[[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' |continent= |location= |climate= |interest=*[[Palace of Peace]] *[[Colony One infirmary]] |population= |demonym= |affiliation=*[[Cult of The One and The All]] *[[Peace Brigade]] }} {{Quote|The town the Peace Brigaders are using as their capital used to be called Colony One, but now it's Peace City, and there are few slaves there. Most of the city's inhabitants are collaborators, and they're guilty by definition.''"
"''The latest reports have slave barracks all over Colony One. They're constructing palaces for the leaders of the Peace Brigade, and a building to house their Senate.|[[Traest Kre'fey]] and [[Kyp Durron]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''}} '''Colony One''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. It was located on the shore of the [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Zoma Gawanga]], between [[Colony Two]] and [[Colony Three]]. The [[Altar of Promises]] and the [[Mountains of the Exalted]] were nearby. After Ylesia [[Battle of Ylesia (26 ABY)|fell]] to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], it was renamed '''Peace City'''. It was the headquarters of the [[Peace Brigade]], and was controlled by the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan. It contained [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] barracks, the [[Palace of Peace]] (the headquarters of the [[Ylesian Senate]]), and a [[damutek]] for [[Maal Lah]]. Close to the city, slaves received their daily euphoria from a [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] [[t'landa Til]]. It was there that [[Pwoe]] was found in a meeting with the Peace Brigade leaders. When it was discovered to be the Peace Brigade's headquarters, it was [[Battle of Ylesia (28 ABY)|invaded]] by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Twin Suns Squadron]]. When the New Republic took the city, Senator Pwoe and [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] were arrested. ==Appearances== *''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}} {{C|As Colony One}} *''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{C|As Colony One}} *''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{C|As Colony One}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Ciudad de la Paz }} [[Category:Capital cities]] [[Category:Cities on Ylesia]]
